note: Slide/track family audit. Geometry facts are exact; scene/playability assessments follow only located source loaders.

exactBinaryAliases.assessment: SlideLong1.TVM and BallZ 2011 Level1.TVM are byte-identical; do not create another scene.

sameNameDistinctBinaries.assessment: These are distinct geometry revisions and must not be silently substituted.

remainingGallery.purpose: Exact-geometry archive visits only. No gameplay, spawn, physics or objectives are inferred.

excludedAliases.reason: Byte-identical to the recovered BallZ 2011 Level1 visit.
Already classified as a FlightX component, not a distinct BallZ scene.

excludedRevision.reason: Distinct same-name binary remains audited, but this requested gallery is scoped to Slide1A, Slides, Steps, both Bump revisions and BallZTrack1.

remainingGallery.materialPolicy: Use exact host StdMat overrides where source exists; otherwise use exact MGRP group colors/textures when valid. A zeroed source material is shown with a disclosed neutral inspection fallback.

host.gameplayBoundary: The older host loads this slide and placeholder rings, but the later complete Ball spawn/physics assembly belongs to a different Slide1 revision.
No transform, spawn, collision setup, camera or objective was located.
No transform, spawn, collision setup, camera or objective was located.
No host was located; open/non-manifold topology and a zero material record are preserved as evidence.
No host was located; this is a distinct UV/vertex re-export of the same bump form.
UpdateScene is empty; ManageCamCtrl is commented out; the 100 diagonal rings are explicitly temporary placeholders.

statusRecommendations.reason: Exact geometry and older static host transform are visitable; the complete later Ball assembly cannot be borrowed from the distinct Slide1 revision.
Exact three-group geometry/colors are visitable, but no host transform, camera, collision, spawn or objective survives.
Exact three-group geometry and grass/concrete/wood bindings are visitable, but no host behavior survives.
Exact geometry/topology is visitable; no host survives and the embedded material record is zeroed.
Exact distinct UV/vertex revision and EarthGri binding are visitable; no host behavior survives.
Exact static host track, Ball spawn and camera evidence survive, but Update/Input are empty and rings are explicit placeholders.

rings.evidence: Level.cpp calls these offsets 'pour le fun' and says XML/table placement is still to implement.

controls.evidence: PushBall accumulates direction impulses, but the rendered impulse block only executes for RotBack; other torque blocks are commented out.

selection.recommendation: PARTIAL non-race visit first; playable only after preserving the source's incomplete-control disclosure and validating collision/spawn in the browser.
selection.rationale: Unlike the unhosted variants, this binary has a complete located assembly: exact transform, Ball.tvm companion, spawn, chase camera, gravity, material and contact settings. Its original input path is incomplete, so a faithful playable claim would currently be false.
selection.exactBoundary: TVM geometry, world transform, Ball.tvm transform, camera offset, gravity, material and contact constants.
selection.inferredBoundary: Web display normalization, managed-lighting translation, overview camera, and any future corrected four-direction controls or objective.

displayNormalization.method: Apply the exact source world transform, then center X/Z, ground the transformed slide minimum Y, and apply one uniform scale.

statusRecommendations.reason: Expose this source-complete assembly as a non-race visit; do not claim playable until collision and the incomplete original input path are handled honestly.
Distinct compact binary revision, but no located loader or behavior binds it.
An older CLBallZ loader exists, but its Ball implementation lacks the later source-backed spawn/physics assembly.

Small textured step assembly with no located host behavior.

Byte-identical to recovered BallZ 2011 Level1; no additional scene record or mode.
A static CLBallZScene host exists, but input/update are empty and its 100 rings are explicitly placeholders.
All copies are the already-integrated FlightX pipe; no distinct BallZ pipe host was found.

relatedVariantEvidence.exact: Bounds and triangle count match exactly, but vertex counts, binary hashes, geometry hashes and UV cardinality differ.
relatedVariantEvidence.inference: GridTex is a deliberate remap/re-export of the same bump form, not a byte-identical duplicate.
